input.back_text: Ingredients: oats, sugar, salt. Nutrition per 100g: Protein 12g, Total Sugars 22g. Net weight 300g.

nemotron_review.priority: Verify the '100% Natural' claim against the evidence printed on the same packet.
nemotron_review.rationale: PacketCourt cannot verify an absolute naturalness claim based on the front claim alone.

boundary: Nemotron reviews evidence gaps but cannot alter deterministic verdicts.
